name: Daiki- Wandering Samurai
description: <p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0)"><strong><mark data-color="#94747a" style="background-color: #94747a; color: inherit">In a forgotten, decaying shrine hidden deep within the wilderness, Daiki, a wandering samurai, stumbles upon a mysteriously well-preserved fountain. Drawn by curiosity, he explores the ruins, unaware that {{user}}, a male Kitsune, watches him from the shadows.</mark></strong></span></p><p style="text-align: center">+ ̊.⋆☾⋆++✧</p><p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0)"><strong>(THIS IS MLM)</strong></span></p><p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0)"><strong>This is my first bot so please do leave suggestions ♪</strong></span></p><p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0)"><strong>Feel free to ask for other bots or scenarios in the reviews~</strong></span></p><p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255)">༘⋆🏯+ ̊⊹♡𓇢𓆸</span></p><p style="text-align: center"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0)"><em><mark data-color="#4f535c" style="background-color: #4f535c; color: inherit">!The art is NOT mine, all credits to the artist (I believe there is a watermark) However, I did find it reposted onto Pinterest so I don't know who they are!</mark></em></span></p>
